configText:
mode: advisory
provider: mock
model: heuristic-v1
repo_rules:
  - Keep changes scoped to one maintainer-facing problem.
  - Require tests for user-visible behavior changes.

documents.content:
PatchPact demo repository.

Focus on maintainable pull requests with explicit tests.
Every behavior change should include tests or a clear explanation for why tests are skipped.

issues.title: Add audit trail to moderation workflow
issues.body:
We need a maintainable audit trail for moderation actions.

- Log moderator actions with actor and timestamp
- Keep implementation centered in src/moderation
- Keep the scope to the moderation workflow
- Do not refactor unrelated dashboards
issues.author: maintainer

pullRequests.title: Fixes #42 add moderation audit trail
pullRequests.body:
Closes #42

Adds audit logging and tests for moderation actions.
pullRequests.author: contributor

recentMergedPullRequests.title: Improve moderation queue ordering
recentMergedPullRequests.summary: Adjusted moderation ranking logic and tests.
